title: [MTR 3/4] Munich Trains
description:
A Resourepack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. The Resourepack adds the BR 423 with the munich used sounds and the munich subway A-Wagen, C1 and C2 and also the new ET 1420!

Thanks for 5000 Downloads!
body:
A Resourepack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. The Resourepack adds the BR 423 with the munich used sounds and the munich subway C1 and C2 and the "Future S-Bahn" (MTR 3)!

MTR 4 Content: Br 423 with the munich used sounds, A-Wagen, C1, C2, ET 1420

Check out [Juli303](https://modrinth.com/user/juli303) for the [MTR 3 Version of the A-Wagen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-mvv-addon)!

Thanks for 5000 Downloads!
